posts.message:
🐔 Chicken Shares Are Going Fast! 🐔
Only 40 birds left available this month! Don't miss your chance to stock your freezer with locally raised chicken from Roswell Family Farm.

Whether you're looking for whole chickens or your favorite cuts, now is the time to reserve yours before they're gone!

📩 Message us today to place your order and claim your birds! 

Thank you for supporting local agriculture and your local family farm! ❤️

#RoswellFamilyFarm #ShopLocal #FarmFreshChicken #SupportLocalFarmers #StockTheFreezer #FarmToTable 🐓🥚🌱

🎃 We need your help planning our pumpkin patch this year! 🎃

What are your favorite pumpkins to decorate with?
🧡 Classic orange pumpkins
🔸Large Carving orange pumpkins 
🤍 White pumpkins
🎃 Stacking pumpkins
🌾 Gourds
✨ Warty pumpkins
Comment below with your favorites (or rank them all!) and let us know what you'd love to see at Roswell Family Farm this fall.

We can't wait to see what everyone chooses! 🍂🍁

🌿🐓 STOCK THE FREEZER WITH FARM-FRESH CHICKEN 🐓🌿
From our family farm to your dinner table — pasture-raised chicken available now at Roswell Family Farm!
✨ Current Cuts Available:
• Chicken Breast — $6.90/lb
• Thighs — $4.25/lb
• Drumsticks — $3.50/lb
• Whole Chickens — $3.90/lb
Perfect for grilling, meal prep, soups, or stocking the freezer! We only have a few whole chickens available, so grab them while they last. 🐔
Message us to order or reserve yours today!
📍 Roswell Family Farm
